changelog:
v2.0.2 (2026-03-22)

  • Fix: SQL endpoint no longer blocks UPDATE..SET queries (SET was incorrectly in blocked keywords list, preventing all UPDATE operations)

v2.0.1 (2026-03-21)

  • Fix: GSC proxy now recognizes Search Console as active when Site Kit is connected

v2.0.0 (2026-03-16)

  • Major: Full browserless wp-admin control — 26 new REST API endpoints
